days.title: Week 7 Day 1: Local Libraries & Community Centers
days.title_native: Semaine 7 Jour 1 : Bibliothèques et centres communautaires

words.example_sentence_target: Où est la bibliothèque la plus proche ?
words.example_sentence_native: Where is the nearest library?
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Oo ay lah bee-blee-oh-teck lah ploo prosh?

words.example_sentence_target: Je voudrais m'inscrire à la bibliothèque.
words.example_sentence_native: I would like to register at the library.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Zhuh voo-dray man-skreer ah lah bee-blee-oh-teck.

words.example_sentence_target: Est-ce que l'inscription est gratuite ?
words.example_sentence_native: Is the registration free?
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Es-kuh lan-skreep-syohn ay grah-twee-t?

words.example_sentence_target: Veuillez remplir ce formulaire.
words.example_sentence_native: Please fill out this form.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Vuh-yay rahm-pleer suh for-moo-lair.

words.example_sentence_target: Avez-vous un justificatif de domicile ?
words.example_sentence_native: Do you have a proof of address?
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Ah-vay voo un zhoos-tee-fee-kah-teef duh doh-mee-seel?

words.example_sentence_target: Le centre communautaire est géré par la mairie.
words.example_sentence_native: The community center is managed by the town hall.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Luh sahn-truh koh-moo-noh-tair ay zhay-ray par lah may-ree.

sentences.target: Y a-t-il des cours de français ici ?
sentences.phonetic: Ee ah-teel day koor duh frahn-say ee-see?

lines.speaker: A
lines.target: Bonjour, je voudrais une carte de bibliothèque.
lines.native: Hello, I would like a library card.
lines.phonetic: Bon-zhoor, zhuh voo-dray oon kart duh bee-blee-oh-teck.

lines.speaker: B
lines.target: Bien sûr. Avez-vous une pièce d'identité ?
lines.native: Of course. Do you have an ID?
lines.phonetic: Byan soor. Ah-vay voo oon pyess dee-dahn-tee-tay?

lines.speaker: A
lines.native: Yes, here is my passport.

lines.speaker: B
lines.target: Merci. Remplissez ce formulaire, s'il vous plaît.
lines.native: Thank you. Fill out this form, please.
lines.phonetic: Mair-see. Rahm-plee-say suh for-moo-lair, seel voo play.

fillBlanks.sentence: Où est la ___ la plus proche ?

days.cultural_note: Public libraries (bibliothèques) and media centers (médiathèques) in France are excellent places to find free internet, newspapers, and community activities.
days.pronunciation_tip: 'Bibliothèque' can be tricky. Break it down: bee-blee-oh-teck.

days.title: Week 7 Day 2: Schools & Parent-Teacher Meetings
days.title_native: Semaine 7 Jour 2 : Écoles et réunions parents-profs

words.example_sentence_target: Mon fils va à l'école primaire.
words.example_sentence_native: My son goes to primary school.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Mohn feess vah ah lay-kohl pree-mair.

words.example_sentence_target: Je veux parler au professeur.
words.example_sentence_native: I want to speak to the teacher.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Zhuh vuh par-lay oh pro-fess-uhr.

words.example_sentence_target: Il a beaucoup de devoirs ce soir.
words.example_sentence_native: He has a lot of homework tonight.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Eel ah boh-koo duh duh-vwahr suh swahr.

words.example_sentence_target: Elle mange à la cantine à midi.
words.example_sentence_native: She eats at the canteen at noon.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Ell mahnzh ah lah kahn-teen ah mee-dee.

words.example_sentence_target: Signez le carnet de correspondance.
words.example_sentence_native: Sign the communication book.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: See-nyay luh kar-nay duh koh-ress-pohn-dahns.

words.example_sentence_target: Les enfants jouent pendant la récréation.
words.example_sentence_native: The children play during recess.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Lay zahn-fahn zhoo pahn-dahn lah ray-kray-ah-syohn.

sentences.target: Il y a une réunion demain.
sentences.phonetic: Eel ee ah oon ray-oo-nyohn duh-man.

sentences.target: Est-ce qu'il a besoin de fournitures ?

dialogues.context: Talking to a teacher at school.

lines.speaker: A
lines.target: Bonjour, je suis le père de Lucas.
lines.native: Hello, I am Lucas's father.
lines.phonetic: Bon-zhoor, zhuh swee luh pair duh loo-kah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.native: Nice to meet you. Lucas is working very well.

lines.speaker: A
lines.native: Does he have any problems in class?

lines.speaker: B
lines.target: Non, il est juste un peu timide.
lines.native: No, he is just a little shy.
lines.phonetic: Nohn, eel ay zhoost un puh tee-meed.

days.cultural_note: In France, education is compulsory from ages 3 to 16. The 'carnet de correspondance' is the primary way parents and teachers communicate.
days.pronunciation_tip: 'Récréation' ends with a nasal sound: ray-kray-ah-syohn.

days.title: Week 7 Day 3: Religious & Cultural Organizations
days.title_native: Semaine 7 Jour 3 : Organisations religieuses et culturelles

words.example_sentence_target: L'église est sur la place.
words.example_sentence_native: The church is on the square.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Lay-gleez ay soor lah plahss.

words.example_sentence_target: Où est la mosquée la plus proche ?
words.example_sentence_native: Where is the nearest mosque?
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Oo ay lah mohs-kay lah ploo prosh?

words.example_sentence_target: Il y a un temple hindou en ville.
words.example_sentence_native: There is a Hindu temple in town.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Eel ee ah un tahm-pluh an-doo ahn veel.

words.example_sentence_target: Cette association aide les migrants.
words.example_sentence_native: This organization helps migrants.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Sett ah-soh-syah-syohn ed lay mee-grahn.

words.example_sentence_target: La cérémonie commence à dix heures.
words.example_sentence_native: The service starts at ten o'clock.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Lah say-ray-moh-nee koh-mahns ah dee-zuhr.

words.example_sentence_target: Les gens viennent ici pour prier.
words.example_sentence_native: People come here to pray.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Lay zhahn vyenn ee-see poor pree-yay.

sentences.native: I am looking for a cultural center.

dialogues.context: Asking about a local community group.

lines.speaker: A
lines.native: Hello, is this a cultural association?

lines.speaker: B
lines.native: Yes, we organize events.

lines.speaker: A
lines.native: How can I become a member?

lines.speaker: B
lines.native: You can fill out this document.

fillBlanks.sentence: Où est la ___ la plus proche ?

sentenceScramble.nativeHint: I am looking for a center

days.cultural_note: France is a secular country (laïcité), but it has a rich diversity of religious and cultural associations that provide support to newcomers.

days.title: Week 7 Day 4: Volunteering & Giving Back

words.example_sentence_target: Je voudrais faire du bénévolat.
words.example_sentence_native: I would like to do some volunteering.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Zhuh voo-dray fair doo bay-nay-voh-lah.

words.example_sentence_target: Nous cherchons un bénévole pour samedi.
words.example_sentence_native: We are looking for a volunteer for Saturday.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Noo shair-shohn un bay-nay-vohl poor sah-muh-dee.

words.example_sentence_target: Je veux aider les autres.
words.example_sentence_native: I want to help others.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Zhuh vuh ay-day lay zoh-truh.

words.example_sentence_target: C'est un beau projet communautaire.
words.example_sentence_native: It's a beautiful community project.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Say tun boh pro-zhay koh-moo-noh-tair.

words.example_sentence_target: Il est important de partager nos compétences.
words.example_sentence_native: It is important to share our skills.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Eel ay tam-por-tahn duh par-tah-zhay noh kohm-pay-tahns.

words.example_sentence_target: Merci pour votre engagement.
words.example_sentence_native: Thank you for your commitment.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Mair-see poor voh-truh ahn-gahzh-mahn.

sentences.native: I like working in a team.

dialogues.context: Offering help to a local charity.

lines.speaker: A
lines.native: Hello, are you looking for volunteers?

lines.speaker: B
lines.target: Oui, pour la distribution de nourriture.
lines.native: Yes, for food distribution.
lines.phonetic: Wee, poor lah dees-tree-boo-syohn duh noo-ree-toor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.native: I am available next Monday.

lines.speaker: B
lines.native: Perfect, we are expecting you.

days.cultural_note: Volunteering is a highly valued activity in France and a great way to improve your French and meet locals.
days.pronunciation_tip: 'Bénévolat' sounds like bay-nay-voh-lah. Keep the 'o' short.

days.title: Week 7 Day 5: Hobbies & Interest Groups
days.title_native: Semaine 7 Jour 5 : Loisirs et groupes d'intérêt

words.example_sentence_target: Quel est votre loisir préféré ?
words.example_sentence_native: What is your favorite hobby?
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Kell ay voh-truh lwah-zeer pray-fay-ray?

words.example_sentence_target: J'aime faire du sport le matin.
words.example_sentence_native: I like doing sport in the morning.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Zhem fair doo spor luh mah-tan.

words.example_sentence_target: Nous faisons de la randonnée en forêt.
words.example_sentence_native: We go hiking in the forest.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Noo fuh-zohn duh lah rahn-doh-nay ahn for-ay.

words.example_sentence_target: La cuisine est une passion pour moi.
words.example_sentence_native: Cooking is a passion for me.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Lah kwee-zeen ay toon pah-syohn poor mwah.

words.example_sentence_target: Je joue de la guitare.
words.example_sentence_native: I play the guitar.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Zhuh zhoo duh lah gee-tar.

words.example_sentence_target: Nous aimons sortir avec des amis.
words.example_sentence_native: We like going out with friends.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Noo ze-mohn sor-teer ah-veck day zah-mee.

sentences.target: Qu'est-ce que tu fais pendant ton temps libre ?
sentences.native: What do you do during your free time?
sentences.phonetic: Kess-kuh too fay pahn-dahn tohn tahn lee-bruh?

sentences.target: Je cherche un club de football.
sentences.native: I am looking for a football club.
sentences.phonetic: Zhuh shair-sh un kloob duh foot-ball.

sentences.target: Est-ce qu'il y a un parc à proximité ?
sentences.phonetic: Es-keel ee ah un park ah prock-see-mee-tay?

lines.speaker: A
lines.native: What are your hobbies?

lines.speaker: B
lines.native: I like reading and cooking a lot.

lines.speaker: A
lines.target: Moi aussi ! Tu veux venir manger demain ?
lines.native: Me too! Do you want to come eat tomorrow?
lines.phonetic: Mwah oh-see! Too vuh vuh-neer mahn-zhay duh-man?

lines.speaker: B
lines.native: Yes, with pleasure!

days.cultural_note: Outdoor activities like 'la randonnée' (hiking) and 'le vélo' (cycling) are very popular in France. Every town has numerous 'clubs' for sports and hobbies.
days.pronunciation_tip: 'Loisir' is pronounced lwah-zeer. The 'oi' sounds like 'wah'.

days.title: Week 7 Day 6: Making Local Friends
days.title_native: Semaine 7 Jour 6 : Se faire des amis locaux

words.example_sentence_target: C'est un bon ami.
words.example_sentence_native: He is a good friend.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Say tun bohn ah-mee.

words.example_sentence_target: Elle est mon amie d'enfance.
words.example_sentence_native: She is my childhood friend.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Ell ay mohn ah-mee dahn-fahns.

words.example_sentence_target: J'aime rencontrer de nouvelles personnes.
words.example_sentence_native: I like meeting new people.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Zhem rahn-kohn-tray duh noo-vell pair-sonn.

words.example_sentence_target: Je veux t'inviter à prendre un café.
words.example_sentence_native: I want to invite you to have a coffee.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Zhuh vuh tan-vee-tay ah prahn-druh un kah-fay.

words.example_sentence_target: Mon voisin est très sympathique.
words.example_sentence_native: My neighbor is very friendly.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Mohn vwah-zan ay tray sam-pah-teek.

words.example_sentence_target: Nous aimons discuter au parc.
words.example_sentence_native: We like to chat at the park.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Noo ze-mohn dees-koo-tay oh park.

sentences.native: Have you lived here for a long time?
Shall we call each other later?

dialogues.context: Meeting a new person at a social event.

lines.speaker: A
lines.native: Hi, my name is David.

lines.speaker: B
lines.native: Nice to meet you David. I'm Marie.

lines.speaker: A
lines.target: Tu fais quoi dans la vie ?
lines.native: What do you do for a living?
lines.phonetic: Too fay kwah dahn lah vee?

lines.speaker: B
lines.native: I am a student. And you?

sentenceScramble.nativeHint: you have lived here a long time

days.cultural_note: French people often prefer to meet over coffee ('prendre un café') or for an 'apéro' (evening drink with snacks) before suggesting a formal dinner.

days.title: Week 7 Day 7: Neighborhood Events & Festivals
days.title_native: Semaine 7 Jour 7 : Événements de quartier et festivals

words.example_sentence_target: C'est la fête du village.
words.example_sentence_native: It is the village festival.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Say lah fett doo vee-lahzh.

words.example_sentence_target: Le marché est ouvert dimanche matin.
words.example_sentence_native: The market is open Sunday morning.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Luh mar-shay ay oo-vair dee-mahnsh mah-tan.

words.example_sentence_target: Il y a un concert gratuit au parc.
words.example_sentence_native: There is a free concert at the park.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Eel ee ah un kohn-sair grah-twee oh park.

words.example_sentence_target: Regarde l'affiche pour l'événement.
words.example_sentence_native: Look at the poster for the event.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Ruh-gard lah-feesh poor lay-vayn-mahn.

words.example_sentence_target: Nous voulons participer à la fête.
words.example_sentence_native: We want to participate in the party.
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Noo voo-lohn par-tee-see-pay ah lah fett.

words.example_sentence_target: Amuse-toi bien !
words.example_sentence_native: Have a good time!
words.example_sentence_phonetic: Ah-mooz twah byan!

dialogues.context: Planning to go to a local festival.

lines.speaker: A
lines.target: Tu as vu l'affiche pour la fête de la musique ?
lines.native: Did you see the poster for the music festival?
lines.phonetic: Too ah voo lah-feesh poor lah fett duh lah moo-zeek?

lines.speaker: B
lines.native: No, when is it?

lines.speaker: A
lines.target: C'est le 21 juin dans toute la ville.
lines.native: It is on June 21st throughout the city.
lines.phonetic: Say luh van-tay-un zhwan dahn toot lah veel.

lines.speaker: B
lines.native: Great! Shall we go together?

days.cultural_note: The 'Fête de la Musique' on June 21st is a nationwide event where free concerts happen on almost every street corner in France.
